item.label: Refresh LRS ratings for selected item

extension.summary: Scrape, cache and publish library ratings, statuses and IMDb Top 250 rank
Scrape, cache and publish library ratings, statuses and IMDb Top 250 rank
extension.description: Scans selected Kodi media types, stores ratings/statuses/awards/IMDb Top 250 rank in an independent cache, and publishes TMDbHelper-compatible window properties for Arctic Fuse 3. Version 1.3.54 keeps the 1.3.52 hub/screensaver/context-menu fixes, removes the duplicate-row richer fallback, and publishes ratings to ListItem, Player, and VideoPlayer TMDbHelper namespaces for OSD compatibility.

Scans selected Kodi media types, stores ratings/statuses/awards/IMDb Top 250 rank in an independent cache, and publishes TMDbHelper-compatible window properties for Arctic Fuse 3. Version 1.3.54 keeps the 1.3.52 hub/screensaver/context-menu fixes, removes the duplicate-row richer fallback, and publishes ratings to ListItem, Player, and VideoPlayer TMDbHelper namespaces for OSD compatibility.
